message:
feat(web): Cx-first start_web_server_with_cx + shutdown_with_cx (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Add Cx-first siblings for the two pub async functions in the web
lifecycle module:

1. `start_web_server_with_cx(cx, config)` in web/server.rs —
   pre-flight checkpoint gates the bind + listener setup so
   cancelled cx-driven CLI invocations bail before claiming a port.
   Pure delegate to legacy `start_web_server`. Re-exported from
   web.rs under the asupersync-runtime feature gate.

2. `WebServerHandle::shutdown_with_cx(cx)` in web.rs — signals
   shutdown + pokes the listener unconditionally so the accept
   loop always wakes, then awaits the runtime join only if the cx
   is not already cancelled. Cancelled parent scopes bail fast
   while preserving the legacy "signal before return" guarantee.

Both legacy methods preserved unchanged.

Integration test `web_health_with_cx_ephemeral_port` in
tests/web.rs exercises the full cx-first pair: bind on port 0,
fetch /health via TCP, shutdown via cx-first path. Verifies an
uncancelled cx produces identical results to the legacy pair
(200 OK, `"ok":true` body, clean shutdown).

Verified via fork bypass (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/
ft-rusticmaple-target, --features web,asupersync-runtime): both
tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
